# APIs for Türkiye

A curated list of APIs from the main catalog that directly target Turkish institutions, companies, or Türkiye-specific data and products.

[![APIs for Türkiye](https://img.shields.io/badge/T%C3%BCrkiye-110%20APIs-dc2626)](./turkey-focused-apis.md)
[![Main Catalog](https://img.shields.io/badge/catalog-409%20APIs-0a7ea4)](../README.md)
[![Playground Links](https://img.shields.io/badge/playground-393%20links-1f8f5f)](https://apideposu.com/en/playground)

## Public Data

| API | Description | Auth | Free | Official |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---:|
| **Adana Ulaşım Bilgi Sistemi**<br><sub>[Docs](https://ulasimbilgi.adana.bel.tr/Otobusler) &middot; [Detail](https://apideposu.com/en/catalog/adana-ulasim)</sub> | Adana public transit route list and stop-based detail pages. | No | Free | &#10003; |
| **AFAD Earthquake API**<br><sub>[Docs](https://deprem.afad.gov.tr/event-filter) &middot; [Test](https://apideposu.com/en/playground?api=afad-deprem) &middot; [Detail](https://apideposu.com/en/catalog/afad-deprem)</sub> | Official AFAD earthquake event feed. | **Ankara EGO Hareket Saatleri**<br><sub>[Docs](https://www.ego.gov.tr/hareketsaatleri) &middot; [Detail](https://apideposu.com/en/catalog/ankara-ego)</sub> | Ankara EGO bus departure times, queryable by route number. | No | Free | &#10003; |

| **CollectAPI Dictionary**<br><sub>[Docs](https://docs.collectapi.com/docs) &middot; [Test](https://apideposu.com/en/playground?api=collectapi-dictionary) &middot; [Detail](https://apideposu.com/en/catalog/collectapi-dictionary)</sub> | Turkish and English dictionary lookup endpoints via CollectAPI. | API Key | Limited | &#10003; |

|:---|:---|:---|:---|:---:|
| **Akbank API Portal**<br><sub>[Docs](https://apiportal.akbank.com/) &middot; [Test](https://apideposu.com/en/playground?api=akbank-api-portal) &middot; [Detail](https://apideposu.com/en/catalog/akbank-api-portal)</sub> | Provides open banking and financial services via the Akbank developer portal. | OAuth 2.0 | Sandbox | &#10003; |

## Notes

- This page is a curated subset of the public catalog.
- The main README keeps all categories in one place; this page highlights the APIs for Türkiye slice only.
- Descriptions stay short here. Use the detail pages for full notes and context.
